If a vine produces fruit, it is valuable. But if it does not produce fruit, it is worthless and useless; it is thrown into the fire. Thus, people are capable of yielding a precious fruit by living for God; this is the only purpose of their existence; and if they fail in this, they are of no use but to be destroyed. What blindness then afflicts those who live in complete neglect of God and true religion! This illustration applies to Jerusalem. Let us beware of an unproductive profession. Let us come to Christ, and seek to abide in him, and have his words abide in us.
